title: Britain announces sweeping ban on most social media for children under 16
summary_full: The U.K. prohibition is set to go further than those of other governments that are lining up against platforms engineered to maximize the time children spend on them
summary_public: The U.K. prohibition is set to go further than those of other governments that are lining up against platforms engineered to maximize the time children spend on them
